system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_tonghop_son_thanhtien","body":"
CREATE   PROCEDURE TR_TONGHOP_SON_THANHTIEN
(
	@donhang nvarchar(max)
)
AS
BEGIN
	SELECT MADONHANG, MASP, SUM(SOLUONG) AS SOLUONG
	INTO #SOLUONG_HOANTHANH
	FROM tr_thongke_soluong A
	WHERE BOPHAN = 'SON'
		AND MADONHANG IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM dbo.fn_Split(@donhang, ','))
	GROUP BY MADONHANG, MASP;

	SELECT C.MADONHANG, A.masp, A.buoc, A.matson, 
		soluongthongke = SUM(DISTINCT C.SOLUONG),
		soluong = SUM(A.soluong), 
		metvuong = SUM(DISTINCT B.metvuong),
		tongsoluong = SUM(A.soluong * B.metvuong),
		dongia = SUM(CT.dongia * A.soluong),
		thanhtien = SUM(CT.dongia * A.soluong * B.metvuong * C.SOLUONG)
	INTO #TONGHOP
	FROM tr_dinhmuc_son3 A
		INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_son3_metvuong B ON A.masp = B.masp AND A.matson = B.matson
		INNER JOIN #SOLUONG_HOANTHANH C ON A.masp = C.MASP
		INNER JOIN tr_material CT ON A.mact = CT.mavt
	--WHERE A.masp =  'CRL-DW-5-03-F_AKZ010_AA'
	GROUP BY C.MADONHANG, A.masp, A.buoc, A.matson;

	DECLARE @columns nvarchar(MAX) = ''
	DECLARE @sql nvarchar(MAX) = ''
	SELECT @columns += QUOTENAME(buoc) + ',' 
	FROM #TONGHOP
	GROUP BY buoc
	ORDER BY buoc

	IF(LEN(@columns) > 0)
	BEGIN
		SET @columns = LEFT(@columns, LEN(@columns) - 1)
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		SET @columns = '[UNKOWN]'
	END

	SET @sql = '
	SELECT * FROM (
		SELECT MADONHANG, A.masp, tensp, buoc, matson, B.ten as tenmatson, soluongthongke, metvuong, thanhtien
		FROM #TONGHOP A
			INNER JOIN tr_common B ON A.matson = B.ma AND B.phanloai = 5
			INNER JOIN tr_sanpham C ON A.masp = C.masp
	) T
	PIVOT
	(
	  SUM(thanhtien)
	  FOR buoc IN (' + @columns + ')
	) AS pt'

	EXECUTE sp_executesql @sql;

	SELECT buoc FROM #TONGHOP GROUP BY buoc ORDER BY buoc;

	DROP TABLE #SOLUONG_HOANTHANH, #TONGHOP;
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.fn_split","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3_metvuong","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_thongke_soluong"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table","dynamic-sql"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
